3067060.name: Alcoholic Daddy
3067060.description:
In this 2D arcade racing game, take on the role of a father who must complete a simple but important mission - to deliver his beloved dog to his daughter.
However, the task is complicated by the fact that the father has had a bit too much to drink.
The game is a 2D arcade with realistic driving physics, where every turn of the wheel requires maximum concentration and precision.

Game features:

Pixel 2D graphics
Complex controls and physics
Driving system and levels
